title: Mossel Bay woman a stalwart in culture
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Yamkela Gora (21) participated in the Miss SA Heritage 2025 competition in Soweto on Saturday 27 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Yamkela Gora (21) participated in the Miss SA Heritage 2025 competition in Soweto on Saturday 27 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Out of 25 finalists, she was crowned the first runner-up, a moment she will treasure forever."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She describes the pageant experience as unforgettable despite feeling nervous at first, and managed to proudly walk across the stage, representing her culture and the Western Cape province.","html":"She describes the pageant experience as unforgettable despite feeling nervous at first, and managed to proudly walk across the stage, representing her culture and the Western Cape province."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I also had the incredible opportunity to meet contestants from various backgrounds and cultures, and I learnt so much about their traditions and perspectives, which made the experience even more enriching,\" she says.","html":"\"I also had the incredible opportunity to meet contestants from various backgrounds and cultures, and I learnt so much about their traditions and perspectives, which made the experience even more enriching,\" she says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Miss SA Heritage competition is an annual beauty pageant focusing on South Africa's various cultures and heritages.","html":"The Miss SA Heritage competition is an annual beauty pageant focusing on South Africa's various cultures and heritages."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pageant shared the winners on its social media platforms, writing that Gora's grace, hard work and dedication shone brightly throughout the journey, making her a true inspiration to young women across South Africa.","html":"The pageant shared the winners on its social media platforms, writing that Gora's grace, hard work and dedication shone brightly throughout the journey, making her a true inspiration to young women across South Africa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Each of the finalists had to engage in charity work and were tasked with truly getting involved with their respective communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Gora, who grew up in Mossel Bay, has been involved in charity work since before competing in Miss SA Heritage.","html":"However, Gora, who grew up in Mossel Bay, has been involved in charity work since before competing in Miss SA Heritage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Helping others has always been something I care about. The competition has helped me reach more people and do even more for my community,\" she says.","html":"\"Helping others has always been something I care about. The competition has helped me reach more people and do even more for my community,\" she says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The lead-up to the final round saw Gora visiting schools in Mossel Bay, making donations of sanitary pads, food, clothing and toiletries, and organising a soup kitchen for Mandela Day.","html":"The lead-up to the final round saw Gora visiting schools in Mossel Bay, making donations of sanitary pads, food, clothing and toiletries, and organising a soup kitchen for Mandela Day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Miss SA Heritage was not the first time Gora had entered the world of beauty pageants."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She had competed in local competitions before, which helped to build her self-confidence and prepare her for a competition such as this one.","html":"She had competed in local competitions before, which helped to build her self-confidence and prepare her for a competition such as this one."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If I had the chance to do it again, I would, because it's not just about the title, but about using the opportunity to inspire others and continue advocating for cultural pride and community upliftment,\" she says.","html":"\"If I had the chance to do it again, I would, because it's not just about the title, but about using the opportunity to inspire others and continue advocating for cultural pride and community upliftment,\" she says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay woman a stalwart in culture
